{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{\"session_id\":\"\",\"offset\":400}","has_more":false,"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7301272413449831231","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一粘近代，当代史的语言，就颠倒了，糊弄和愚弄起读者来了，“谎言叫喊一百遍就是真理”看样子还能活到，现在的读者死亡之时"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699961576,"group_id":"7270061432232741922","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9dSacswHsf0mYS8EDjf7Ek=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"84036023608","user_name":"喜欢杧果的陆凡笑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"84036023608","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7270061432232741922","book_info":{"abstract":"文章记录了男主人公从大学毕业到进入职场工作的经历、见闻，与同届女生的感情纠葛，与领导同事的相处之道，用独特视角见证这个特殊职场的人情冷暖。对大学毕业进入体制内的学生具有一定借鉴意义，女主人公的处事方式和生活状态都赋予了本文令人期待的走向……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o24161a7b7c65db7e5d7befa42a9aa382~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"夜阑卧听风雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7270061432232741922","book_name":"职场见闻录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#0060a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":750,\"name\":\"职场婚恋\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750\u0026name=职场婚恋\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":3,\"name\":\"现代言情\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3\u0026name=现代言情\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_i
